---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Hololand
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

**Example**: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

## 📚 Use Cases

Describe real-world scenarios where this feature would be useful:

1. **Use Case 1**: [Description]
2. **Use Case 2**: [Description]
3. **Use Case 3**: [Description]

## 🎨 Example Code (Optional)

If applicable, show how this feature might be used:

```typescript
// Example of how the API could look
import { NewFeature } from '@hololand/package';

const feature = new NewFeature({
  // configuration
});
```

## 🖼️ Mockups/Diagrams (Optional)

If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or sketches.

## 📦 Affected Packages

Which Hololand packages would this feature affect?

- [ ] @hololand/core
- [ ] @hololand/world
- [ ] @hololand/renderer
- [ ] @hololand/react-three
- [ ] @hololand/ai-bridge
- [ ] @hololand/commerce
- [ ] @hololand/social
- [ ] @hololand/builder
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## 🚀 Implementation Ideas (Optional)

If you have thoughts on implementation, share them here.

## 🔗 Related Issues

- Related to #(issue number)

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This feature aligns with Hololand's vision
- [ ] I have described clear use cases

## 📊 Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Blocking my work
- [ ] High - Significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Future enhancement
